name: Joining different datasets
description: Data merger pipeline: fetches data from two different API endpoints, merges and joins the datasets using SQL-like logic in a code step, and posts the combined results to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

apiUrlA.description: First API endpoint URL (default: JSONPlaceholder users)

apiUrlB.description: Second API endpoint URL (default: JSONPlaceholder posts)

joinKey.description: Join key as 'keyA:keyB' (default: 'id:userId' to join users with their posts)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post merged results

steps.name: Fetch Dataset A from first API
Fetch Dataset B from second API
Build Slack Block Kit message with merge results
